title: Parent/Child Activity Groups * Disabilities Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Parent/Child Activity Groups * Disabilities Issues 3 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Disabilities Issues Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK BEND OFFICE QUARTERLY FAMILY FUN DAYS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers quarterly events geared towards anyone whose life has been affected by disability. Events encourage people to interact and participate in activities such as movie night, picnic in the park, parades, BBQ with the Bend Elks, sensory friendly movies, other sensory friendly events, sledding, and other events. This provides networking opportunities for families. 2525 NE Twin Knolls Drive Suite 7 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Families and children with disabilities Hours: Varies by event Email (541) 548-8559 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK KLAMATH FALLS OFFICE QUARTERLY FAMILY FUN DAYS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers quarterly events geared towards anyone whose life has been affected by disability.
